title: Evangelion 222 Noguchi Screening in Hakone
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.22 Noguchi Screening in Hakone (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 09, 2010 9:25 pm http://www.evageeks.org/2010/04/evangelion-2-22-screening/ Anybody here currently visiting Hakone or plan to soon?

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel » Fri Apr 09, 2010 9:56 pm Wow, I wish. It'd be nice if they showed just one movie in Australia, but I'm not counting on that ever happening.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Sat Apr 10, 2010 11:59 pm Sure, after I play a nice round of golf. [URL=http://img188.imageshack.us/i/34387881.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sun Apr 11, 2010 2:35 am I was in hakone last year. Took the pirate boat across the lake. So beautiful. and seen 2.0 afew weeks so i'm set.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sun Apr 11, 2010 7:26 pm I would like to go... since it's in the week-end, maybe I can make it, if I have enough money.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Sun Apr 11, 2010 8:02 pm Tokyo-3 is built on a Golf course?....win.

[]:             Quote Post by GoatMan » Mon Apr 12, 2010 2:10 am Don't tell me... the next Angel is a gopher that makes dolphin calls, and Misato chooses to hunt it with plastic explosive shaped in the form of rabbits.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Mon Apr 12, 2010 2:11 am GoatMan wrote: Don't tell me... the next Angel is a gopher that makes dolphin calls, and Misato chooses to hunt it with plastic explosive shaped in the form of rabbits.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 12, 2010 2:20 am Super-nerdy article alert: Pilgrammage to Tokyo-3 Not of much relevance to 2.0, but I found it when looking for further confirmation of the "lolwut golf course?" thing (since I suck at interpreting satellite images).

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Mon Apr 12, 2010 2:37 am GoatMan wrote: Don't tell me... the next Angel is a gopher that makes dolphin calls, and Misato chooses to hunt it with plastic explosive shaped in the form of rabbits.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Apr 12, 2010 3:57 am Dartz wrote: I will not write an EVA/Caddyshack crossover....

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Apr 24, 2010 6:14 pm For whatever it's worth: IRC information wrote: [2010-04-24 10:38:11] NAveryW Oh, looks like they're canceling the screenings of 2.0 in Hakone because it's inconveniencing the residents SSD Whoa. NAveryW [url]http://eva2.0.b-ch.com/blog/2_0/archives/264[/url] NAveryW [url]http://eva2.0.b-ch.com/blog/2_0/archives/265[/url] NAveryW Eric's giving me a general translation NAveryW The residents were being disturbed by an influx of Eva fans, apparently, who were parking in unauthorized places and, er, breaking into public homes NAveryW : Eric_Blair again, it's not "invaded homes" as in "breaking an entering" NAveryW : Eric_Blair in Japan, if you park your car outside someone else's property, you are trespassing NAveryW So anyway, the people of Hakone submitted a plea to the council or something NAveryW Oh, OK, the screening hasn't been canceled YET. But because there's a big Tokyo-3 viral marketing campaign (e.g. Lawson's giving out Nerv bags and Unit 01 appearing via augmented reality), the citizens of Hakone are being disturbed by an influx of otaku and have made a plea to the city council to cancel the screening SSD ah NAveryW ...Well, at least the Tokyo-3 viral marketing campaign didn't turn out as badly as the one for the Aqua Teen Hunger Force movie NAveryW Come to think of it, it's sort of the opposite. Too many people are arriving in Hakone, parking everywhere and disturbing the peace. With the Aqua Teen thing, because people thought the Mooninite LEDs were bombs, everyone was evacuated.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Apr 24, 2010 7:01 pm Addendum: Addended wrote: <Eric_Blair> fyi, it's not a big marketting campaign <Eric_Blair> it's centered around the Lawsons that appears while Shinji, Kensuke and Toji are getting ice cream before Toji's sister appears

[]:             Quote Post by Peewit » Sun Apr 25, 2010 4:17 am Reichu wrote: Pilgrammage to Tokyo-3

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Apr 25, 2010 6:15 am Peewit wrote: Oh dear... Is Eva a religion now?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Apr 25, 2010 11:09 am Peewit wrote: Oh dear... Is Eva a religion now?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Apr 25, 2010 11:34 am ANN states the Hakone 2.22 Event is still going to occur just as planned. (By the way, there's some information overlap with this thread .)

[]:             Quote Post by rilocay » Tue Apr 27, 2010 6:01 am Ramiel wrote: Wow, I wish. It'd be nice if they showed just one movie in Australia, but I'm not counting on that ever happening.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon May 24, 2010 2:32 pm Mmkay, so the I Would Give You Anything Noguchi Version is still in Japanese and is still Tsubasa o Kudsai, it just simple adds claps (hence the "Komm Susser Tod 3rd Impact holy shit we're all going to become tang and die" feeling) and sounds slightly like the version we hear in the 2.22 Promo Vid but not quite. Thanks to Naw-kun for the information and mp3 ! (Holy wow, I nearly crapped myself with hearing Shinji's screams. @_@ No wonder Ogata fell to the floor and was so tired from all the screaming.) GODAMN THIS MOVIE IS EPIC. I DON'T CARE WHAT ANYBODY SAYS. IT'S EPIC .

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Mon May 24, 2010 2:39 pm GIVE ME THE MP3!!!!!
